sections.name: Rank
lines: Presentation of the Blessed Virgin Mary;;Duplex majus;;4;;ex C11

sections.name: Oratio
lines: O God, by Whose will the blessed Mary, ever Virgin, the dwelling place of the Holy Spirit, was on this day presented in the temple, grant, we beseech You, that by her intercession we may be found worthy to be brought into the temple of Your glory.
